results.name: redcap
results.description: Goblins inspired by real life redcap goblin folklore.

results.name: redcap (shadowmoor)
results.description: Homicidal goblins from Shadowmoor that dye their heads red with blood from their victims

results.name: red dragon (dnd)
results.description: The iconic species of firebreathing dragons from Dungeons and Dragons.

results.name: red eye
results.description: Red eyes, possibly of the glowing variety.

results.name: references keyword
results.description: Cards that reference a keyword or mechanic that don't actually have that mechanic.

results.name: reflexive trigger
results.description: An ability that triggers based on actions taken earlier during a spell or ability's resolution.

results.name: refund
results.description: Immediately get mana or untapped lands back.

results.name: regenerates other
results.description: Cards with effects that regenerate other things (and possibly including themselves.)

results.name: regenerates self
results.description: Cards with effects that regenerate themselves.

results.name: regional variant
results.description: Arts uniquely available in certain regions. For example, Chinese cards often receive unique variables to remove skeletons.

results.name: regrowth
results.description: Effects that return cards from your graveyard to your hand.

results.name: regrowth-any
results.description: Bring back a card of any card type from your graveyard to your hand.

results.name: relaxed commander restriction
results.description: (Typically) playtest cards that bend the rules of what you can or cannot run in your commander deck, such as deck size or allowing you to run cards outside of the what the commander's color identity would allow.

results.name: relentless
results.description: Cards you can have more than the usual number of in your deck.

results.name: reminder card
results.description: Cards that remind you of your game state.
